zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Valentine Pettit於1486年出生在英國肯特易斯爾 本 森特時，他的父親Sir John Pettit49歲，母親Dame Daundelyon47歲。他於1521年與Lady Joana Beverley結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1545年3月在英國肯特馬蓋特享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特馬蓋特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Valentine Pettit于1486年出生在英国肯特易斯爾 本 森特时，他的父亲Sir John Pettit49岁，母亲Dame Daundelyon47岁。他于1521年与Lady Joana Beverley结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1545年3月在英国肯特馬蓋特享年59岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特馬蓋特。

nameMeanings.name: Pettit
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Petit
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Alain, Michel, Normand, Mireille, Philippe, Pierre, Achille, Armand, Jean Claude, Jean Jacques, Ketly, Adrien.

French, Walloon, Catalan, English, Jewish (from southern France), West Indian (mainly Haiti), and Mauritian: from (Old) French, Catalan, and Middle English petit ‘small’, hence a nickname for a small man (or an ironic nickname for a big man), or a distinguishing name for the younger of two bearers of the same personal name. Compare Little , Petee , and Petite .

History: Charles Petit from Anneville-Ambourville in Seine-Maritime, France, married Jeanne Rossignol (Martin and Renée Desjardins) in Quebec City, QC, in 1670. Nicolas Petit dit Lapré/Laprée from Le Gué-d'Alleré in Charente-Maritime, France, married Marie Pouponnel in Trois-Rivières, QC, in 1656. Pierre Petit dit Gobin from Lyon in Rhône married Marguerite Véron in Trois-Rivières, QC, in 1692. Pierre Petit dit Saint-Pierre from Évreux in Eure, France, married Judith Miville in Quebec City, QC, in 1758; see also St. Pierre . — This surname is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

nameMeanings.name: Valentine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Latin name Valentinus, a derivative of valens ‘healthy, strong’. This was the name of a Roman martyr of the 3rd century, whose feast is celebrated on 14 February . This was the date of a pagan fertility festival marking the first stirrings of spring, which has survived in an attenuated form under the patronage of the saint.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Valentine Pettit was born in 1486, in Isle of Thanet, Kent, England, his father, Sir John Pettit, was 49 and his mother, Dame Daundelyon, was 47. He married Lady Joana Beverley in 1521. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died in March 1545, in Margate, Kent, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Margate, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Valentine Pettit est né en 1486, à Isle of Thanet, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Pettit, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Dame Daundelyon, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Lady Joana Beverley en 1521. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en mars 1545, à Margate, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Margate, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Valentine Pettit 1486 in Isle of Thanet, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Pettit 49 und seine Mutter Dame Daundelyon 47. Er hat 1521 Lady Joana Beverley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb im März 1545 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Margate, Kent, England und wurde in Margate, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Valentine Pettit è nato il nel 1486 nel Isle of Thanet, Kent, England, il suo padre, Sir John Pettit, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Dame Daundelyon, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Lady Joana Beverley nel 1521. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel marzo 1545, nel Margate, Kent, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Margate, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Valentine Pettitが1486年にイギリスケントイスル オフ サンエットで生まれた時，父Sir John Pettitは49歳，母Dame Daundelyonは47歳であった。1521年にLady Joana Beverleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1545年3月にイギリスケントマルガトで59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントマルガトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Valentine Pettit(이)가 1486년 영국 켄트 이슬일 프 스아닛에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Pettit(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Dame Daundelyon(은)는 47세였다. 그는 1521년 Lady Joana Beverley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1545년 3월 영국 켄트 마가트에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 마가트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Valentine Pettit nasceu em 1486, em Isle of Thanet, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Pettit, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Dame Daundelyon, tinha 47 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Joana Beverley em 1521. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em março de 1545, em Margate, Kent, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Margate, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Valentine Pettit родился в 1486 г. в местности исл оф танет, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Pettit было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Dame Daundelyon, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Joana Beverley в 1521 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер марта 1545 г. в местности маргэит, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности маргэит, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Valentine Pettit nació en 1486, en Isle of Thanet, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Pettit, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Dame Daundelyon, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Lady Joana Beverley en 1521. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en marzo de 1545, en Margate, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Margate, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
